bead.title: ddx init global/project split and ddx doctor two-layer install report
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a, slice 4 of 4)

First-time machine setup needs `ddx init --global` as the umbrella that installs the default ddx plugin globally and wires agent-tier links, while plain `ddx init` must only create the project root and leave plugins to lazy resolution. Operators also need `ddx doctor` to report both install layers so they can see whether the global tree, the project tree, or a lazy fallback is in effect.

ROOT CAUSE
- `runInit` (cli/cmd/init.go:73) branches on `--global` (init.go:75) to call `initGlobal` (init.go:318), which installs the bundled default ddx plugin into `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx` (init.go:319-328), links it into the home-level harness skill dirs, and writes `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml` via `writeGlobalConfig` (init.go:362). The non-global path `initProject` (init.go:132) must NOT install plugins — plugins lazy-resolve from global.
- `reportSkillInstallTopology` (cli/cmd/doctor.go:421) prints the global line (`${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx`, doctor.go:421,447) and the project line with status one of ok/missing/`lazy-resolves-to-global` (doctor.go:427-448).
- CLAUDE.md "Persona System" section must document the project→global→baked-in install precedence.

PROPOSED FIX
Ensure `ddx init --global` creates the agent-tier links (`~/.claude/skills/ddx` and `~/.agents/skills/ddx`) pointing into `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx/` and writes the global config; ensure `ddx init` (no flag) creates `<project>/.ddx/` but does NOT write any plugins (lazy resolution). Ensure `ddx doctor` renders both "Global Install" and "Project Install" lines with correct statuses. Update CLAUDE.md "Persona System" to document install precedence and the two layers.

NON-SCOPE
- The install/update command surfaces (slices 2 and 3).
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.
- Migrating any `~/.config/ddx/` legacy paths.

DEPS
- Slice 1 (lookup precedence), slice 2 (global install machinery used by init --global), slice 3 (project install/lazy behavior), and ddx-06cbaa90 (home resolution).
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks` (cli/cmd/init_test.go:736) asserts `~/.claude/skills/ddx` and `~/.agents/skills/ddx` point into `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx/`.
2. `TestInitGlobal_WritesGlobalConfig` (cli/cmd/init_test.go:773) asserts `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml` is written with convention defaults.
3. `TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins` (cli/cmd/init_test.go:36) asserts `ddx init` (in-project) creates `<project>/.ddx/` but does not write to plugins/ — plugins lazy-resolve from global.
4. `ddx doctor`'s `reportSkillInstallTopology` (cli/cmd/doctor.go:421) renders the "Global Install" and "Project Install" lines with correct ok/missing/lazy-resolves-to-global statuses, covered by a doctor test.
5. CLAUDE.md "Persona System" section documents the project→global→baked-in install precedence, committed in this bead.
6. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
